# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Listener configuration
listeners=PLAINTEXT://kafka-server1:9092,PLAINTEXT://kafka-server2:9093,PLAINTEXT://kafka-server3:9094

# Log directories
log.dirs=/var/log/kafka/server.log,/var/log/kafka/offsets.log,/var/log/kafka/state-change.log

# Replication settings
default.replication.factor=3
min.insync.replicas=2
replica.fetch.max.bytes=1048576

# Zookeeper connection
zookeeper.connect=kafka-zk1:2181,kafka-zk2:2181,kafka-zk3:2181

# Broker ID
num.partitions=10
num.recovery.period.seconds=3000
broker.id=1

# Security configuration (for production deployment)
security.inter.broker.protocol.PlainTextListener=PLAINTEXT://kafka-server1:9092,PLAINTEXT://kafka-server2:9093,PLAINTEXT://kafka-server3:9094

# Kafka internal settings
log.retention.bytes=1073741824
log.retention.ms=604800000
log.cleanup.interval.mins=10
